title: Data and Tools
text: Renewable Energy Materials Properties Database Identifies the type, quantity, source, and other properties of materials used by solar power technologies PV Bifacial Irradiance and Performance Modeling Toolkit Enables time-series bifacial PV irradiance and electrical data modeling Photovoltaics ATB: Annual Technology Baseline Technology cost and performance projection data for solar systems
